ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – May 20
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for submitting your semester project reports is on Friday, May 20, 2024. Please ensure your PDF files are uploaded to the course portal by 11:59 PM. Late submissions will incur a penalty of 5% per day unless prior approval is obtained.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact me or the teaching assistants.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Dr. Emily Carter
Assistant Professor, Computer Science
University of Lakeshore

spam.subject: URGENT: Action Required – Tax Refund Verification
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Your 2023 income tax refund is pending. Our records indicate that the refund has not been processed due to missing information. To avoid a delay of up to 30 days and potential penalties, you must verify your account details within 48 hours.

Please click the link below to confirm your personal information and receive the refund:

<URL>

If you do not act promptly, your refund may be withheld and further actions may be taken to recover the funds.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Office of Tax Services
